Atlas rollout / working plan

Ship the new workspace without surprising the teams who depend on it.

Three deliberate phases keep migration, enablement, and launch-day support visible while each owner retains a manageable scope.

Target dateAugust 18
Workstreams6 active
Readiness82%
01 · This week

Prove the migration

Run representative accounts through the dry run and close every data-integrity exception.

Owner: Data platform · due Friday
02 · Next week

Prepare the teams

Publish role-specific guidance and rehearse the handoff with support and success.

Owner: Enablement · due August 9
03 · Launch

Operate the room

Keep one decision log, explicit escalation paths, and a staffed rollback window.

Owner: Release lead · due August 18
Dependency Owner Status Next evidence
Historical import Data platform Ready Dry-run report
Support routing Operations In progress Escalation drill
